title: furry_bohe
description: This is a mod for furry. The mod adds 'Furry-bohe' and fursuits in Minecraft. You can transfur yourselves to a furry.
body:
The mod was made by MCr (Mcreator).
The mod is made for furry. 
It’s name is ‘Furry_bohe’ .
In this mod ,we add some items such as ‘Furry_bohe’ (furry mint) , fur , fursuit_template and fursuits . 
We also add a block ‘fur_loom’ and its GUI . It’s used for making templates and fur cloth . 
We add some potion ‘oestrus’ ,‘transfur’, ‘heavy’ , ‘weak’ and ‘fractured’ . 
We add the tools ‘furry_paw’ ‘cotton_bow’ and ‘haocan’s_secret’ .
We add 5 kinds of buildings.
We add 6 discs.
We add some achievements.
